today.title: Roadmap Sync
today.synopsis: Mike-organised 30-min sync with Ciara Carroll on the product roadmap. Follows the roadmap review Mike arranged with Chloe yesterday (13/05) where he asked Chloe to confirm she was happy with the roadmap.
discussion_topics: Roadmap priorities for upcoming sprint — sprint planning is this afternoon at 14:30
GDCU-8392 WC Cosmo Spins Reskin (Ciara, In Progress) — progress and WC 11 June deadline
GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign (Ciara, In Progress) — completion timeline
Jessica Figma files handover — Ciara flagged urgency in DM on 13/05 (files in local drafts risk being lost)
today.prep_notes: Review the roadmap you walked Chloe through yesterday. Key points to confirm with Ciara: (1) Status of her two active In Progress tickets (GDCU-8392 WC Cosmo Spins Reskin and GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign) — both updated at 08:23–08:34 this morning, suggesting she's been active; (2) Agree a plan for Jessica's Figma local draft files — Ciara flagged yesterday they may not be backed up and account removal could cause permanent loss; (3) Align on which design items to carry into the new sprint given Jessica's reduced availability.

today.title: Project (personal work block)
today.synopsis: Personal focus block with no attendees. Bridges the Roadmap Sync and the afternoon's back-to-back interview + sprint planning sessions.
today.prep_notes: Use this window to: (1) Review Greenhouse interview kits for Thibault Bougard (13:30) and James Whelan (16:00) — both via https://s101.recruiting.eu.greenhouse.io/; (2) Respond to Chloe's 08:29 #gdc-product-design-pod message about sprint close; (3) Review and clear GDCU-8971 (only remaining In Product ticket).

today.title: Interview — Thibault Bougard (1st interview)
today.synopsis: First-round interview for candidate Thibault Bougard, organised by recruiter Liam Caffrey. Interview panel is Mike Pett and Gabriel Cornoiu. Greenhouse scorecard link in calendar invite.
discussion_topics: Role requirements and team fit discussion
today.prep_notes: Review the Greenhouse interview kit (link in invite) before this session. Note: Liam Caffrey is the GDC recruiter, not the candidate. Align with Gabriel on scoring criteria beforehand. This runs 13:30–14:30; Sprint Planning starts at 14:30 — leave promptly to join sprint planning on time (same Zoom link as standup: https://gdcgroup.zoom.us/j/4789482034).

today.title: Sprint Planning
today.synopsis: Full-team sprint planning for the next sprint cycle, organised by Chloe Christie. Chloe signalled sprint close TODAY at 08:29 in #gdc-product-design-pod. World Cup 11 June deadline is the primary sequencing constraint. All direct reports (Ciara Carroll, Jessica Dordevic, Miguel Migneco, Victoria Dadson) are listed attendees. Note: GDCU Assemble Standup (14:30–15:00) uses the same Zoom link and is subsumed by this planning session.
discussion_topics: GDCU-8935 WC Predictor Game (Miguel, In Progress, updated 08:34 today) — sprint 2 scope and dev handoff target
GDCU-8392 WC Cosmo Spins Reskin (Ciara, In Progress, updated 08:23 today) — completion timeline vs 11 June
GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign (Ciara, In Progress, updated 08:34 today) — carry-over or close this sprint?
GDCU-8907 Betting Tips Hub (Sanja, Blocked/In QA, updated 08:21 today) — blocker resolution plan
GDCU-8906 NL Claude Tables (Jessica, In Progress) — reassignment/handover risk given consultation period
GDCU-8432 Geo Locate Images Global HP (High priority, no assignee, updated 13/05) — dev assignment needed
GDCU-8983 Cosmo Spins Login Issues (Harden, In QA, updated 08:38 today) — expected to clear
GDCU-8951 Learning Hub Phase 2 (Carlos, In Progress, updated 08:23 today)
Sprint velocity context: 6 tickets completed in last 48h (strong close to current sprint)
today.prep_notes: Before this meeting: (1) Reply to Chloe's 08:29 message in #gdc-product-design-pod about which tickets to close — she is closing the sprint TODAY; (2) Prioritise WC items (GDCU-8935, GDCU-8392) for the new sprint; (3) Flag GDCU-8906 for reassignment — Jessica is in consultation period; (4) Confirm GDCU-8432 (High, unassigned) gets a dev allocated; (5) Chase Sanja before planning on GDCU-8907 blocker status (she's in the meeting); (6) Note GDCU-8971 (Novica, In Product) should be cleared by the time planning starts.

today.title: Interview — James Whelan (1st interview)
today.synopsis: First-round interview for candidate James Whelan, organised by Liam Caffrey. Same panel as the 13:30 Bougard interview. Immediately follows Sprint Planning.
today.prep_notes: Review Greenhouse interview kit for James Whelan before 16:00. Back-to-back panel day — plan a 5-min debrief with Gabriel between Sprint Planning and this interview. Agree post-day debrief logistics with Liam for both candidates.

action_items.action: RESPOND TO CHLOE'S SPRINT CLOSE REQUEST — Chloe posted in #gdc-product-design-pod at 08:29 today asking which tickets can be closed before she closes the sprint. The only currently-In-Product ticket is GDCU-8971 (Novica, Cosmo Spins how-to videos). Review it now and reply to Chloe before the 11:40 work block ends. Sprint Planning is at 14:30 — Chloe needs confirmation before then.

REVIEW AND CLEAR GDCU-8971 (IN PRODUCT) — [GDC][DEV] Create How-to Videos for Cosmo Spins Reskin. Assigned to Novica Vukobratovic, updated 08:13 today. Novica to document the reskin process via video and share with the team. Currently the ONLY ticket in In Product review. Review and approve/feedback during the 11:40 work block so Chloe can close the sprint. Stakeholders: Eoin McCarthy, Joshua Smith, Gabriel Cornoiu, Kelvin Yee.

SPRINT PLANNING PREP (14:30 today) — Full team sprint planning with all direct reports. WC 11 June hard deadline is the primary driver. Prepare: (1) WC priority order: GDCU-8935 (WC Predictor, Miguel) and GDCU-8392 (Cosmo Spins Reskin, Ciara) must be sprint 1; (2) Flag GDCU-8906 (NL Claude Tables, Jessica) for reassignment; (3) Bring a dev name for GDCU-8432 (Geo Locate Images, High, no assignee); (4) Brief on GDCU-8907 (Betting Tips Hub) blocker resolution plan. Interview with Thibault Bougard ends at 14:30 — transition immediately.

JESSICA DORDEVIC — OPERATIONAL IMPACT. Jessica received an 'at risk' email on 12/05 and is in a consultation period. GDCU-8906 (NL Claude Tables, In Progress) is assigned to her and needs reassignment planning before sprint planning today. Separately, Ciara raised urgent concern yesterday (DM 15:01–16:10) that Jessica's Figma local drafts may not be backed up — coordinate with Ciara ASAP to recover any local design files before account access changes.

GDCU-8907 BETTING TIPS HUB — Still Blocked/In QA (Sanja Budic). Updated this morning at 08:21 with no status change. Sanja confirmed the fix was applied on 07/05 — this is now 7 days stale in blocked QA. Chase Sanja directly before Sprint Planning (she's in the meeting at 14:30). High-visibility ticket — Butlin, Dan Smullen, Gabriel all stakeholders.

INTERVIEW PREP — Two candidate interviews today: (1) Thibault Bougard, 13:30 BST; (2) James Whelan, 16:00 BST. Both are 1st interviews via Greenhouse, Liam Caffrey organising, Gabriel Cornoiu co-panelling. Review both Greenhouse scorecards during the 11:40 work block. Agree with Gabriel on scoring framework before 13:30.

IUJ PRIZE WHEEL ADMIN PANEL DISCREPANCY — Mike raised in #gdc-pod at 09:00 yesterday that the wheel slices are editable in QA admin but the interface isn't available in Prod (https://qa.gambling.com/admin/game-config/wheel-slices). No visible response yet. Follow up to get a dev to investigate the QA vs Prod admin panel inconsistency.

VIC DADSON RETURN PLAN — Vic is back from sick leave. She proactively reached out on 12/05 and you had a call at 4pm that day. Mike had previously briefed her (23/04) that the Data Engineering team (Nemanja) will support her with requirements and knowledge sharing on her return. Confirm return date and schedule a meeting with Nemanja to establish the data engineering support plan.

WC PREDICTOR GAME (GDCU-8935) — Miguel Migneco, In Progress, updated 08:34 today. Get a status check from Miguel in the Roadmap Sync or before Sprint Planning: how far along is the design? Dev handoff target is needed to meet the 11 June deadline.
GDCU-8432 GEO LOCATE IMAGES GLOBAL HP — High priority, no assignee, To Do, updated 13/05. This ticket has no dev assigned and needs one for the new sprint. Raise in Sprint Planning today.

SHANE'S BUGS (#gdc-pod, 13/05) — Two items raised: (1) Search arrow is broken (Shane, 11:37 — no ticket confirmed); (2) GDCU-8978 Password Reset flow ends without redirect (Shane, logged 12/05). Confirm both have tickets and are triaged/prioritised for next sprint.

ROBIN'S FOOTER BUGS (#gdc-pod, 13/05) — Robin flagged: (1) GDC SE Homepage footer Twitter icon redirects to GDC SE homepage instead of Twitter; (2) GDC AU footer Quick Links are missing. Check if content-related or a dev issue and assign accordingly.

COSMO SPINS SESSION BUG — Shane reported Dean raised this again on 12/05: session not being killed properly, reproducible issue affecting mobile vs desktop behaviour. GDCU-8983 (Cosmo Spins Login Issues, Harden, In QA, updated 08:38 today) may be related. Confirm Harden's QA covers the session handling issue Dean described.
